name: @tdwhere/do-it
description: Autonomy-first AI coding workflow for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode with task-fit skills, optional subagents, and evidence-backed completion.
author: tdwhere123

scripts.build:generated: node scripts/build-claude-agents.mjs && node scripts/build-skills-index.mjs && node scripts/build-index-json.mjs
scripts.build:codex-plugin: npm run build:generated && node scripts/build-codex-plugin.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-bundle.mjs
scripts.build:cursor-plugin: npm run build:generated && node scripts/build-cursor-plugin.mjs && node scripts/validate-cursor-plugin.mjs && node scripts/validate-harness-matrix.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run build:generated && node scripts/build-codex-plugin.mjs && node scripts/build-cursor-plugin.mjs && node scripts/build-opencode-plugin.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-bundle.mjs && node scripts/validate-cursor-plugin.mjs && node scripts/validate-harness-matrix.mjs && node scripts/validate-core-skill-boundaries.mjs
scripts.test-hooks: bash scripts/test-hooks.sh && bash tests/hooks/behavior-feedback.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/strict-external-actions.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/router.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/routing-golden.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/write-quality-lint.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/comments-lint.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/anti-patterns-lint.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/verification-gate.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/grill-prompt.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/subagent-stance.test.sh && bash tests/hooks/common.test.sh
scripts.test: npm run build:generated && node scripts/build-codex-plugin.mjs && npm run build:cursor-plugin && npm run validate:agents && npm run validate:cursor-plugin && npm run check:skill-links && npm run validate:quality-families && npm run validate:core-skill-boundaries && npm run validate:legacy-names && npm run lint-hooks && npm run test-hooks && npm run test-agent-bundle && npm run test-install && npm run test-release && npm run test-opencode
